content.json:
# Arc Drift Dashboard

Drift detection across **Azure Arc–enabled servers**, both at the Azure control-plane level and inside the guest OS. Use the tabs below to switch views. All data is read-only and obeys your Entra RBAC.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status), lastSeen = todatetime(properties.lastStatusChange)
| summarize Total = count(),
            Connected = countif(status == 'Connected'),
            Disconnected = countif(status == 'Disconnected'),
            Expired = countif(status == 'Expired')
content.title: Arc machines — connection state

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| summarize count() by osType
content.title: Machines by OS type

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| extend agentVersion = iff(isempty(agentVersion), 'unknown', agentVersion)
| summarize count() by agentVersion
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Arc agent version (drift)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| summarize count() by location
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Machines by region

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend mid = tolower(id)
| project mid
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where name in~ ('AzureMonitorWindowsAgent','AzureMonitorLinuxAgent')
    | extend mid = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | summarize HasAMA = count() by mid
) on mid
| extend AMA = iff(isnotnull(HasAMA) and HasAMA > 0, 'Installed', 'Missing')
| summarize count() by AMA
content.title: AMA coverage

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend tagKeys = bag_keys(tags)
| extend HasEnv = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'Environment') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'environment') >= 0,
         HasOwner = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'Owner') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'owner') >= 0,
         HasCC = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'CostCenter') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'costCenter') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'costcenter') >= 0
| extend Status = iff(HasEnv and HasOwner and HasCC, 'All required tags present', 'Missing required tag(s)')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Required tags compliance (Environment / Owner / CostCenter)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend mid = tolower(id)
| project mid
| join kind=leftouter (
    insightsresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.insights/datacollectionruleassociations'
    | extend mid = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/providers/microsoft.insights')[0]))
    | summarize Assocs = count() by mid
) on mid
| extend Coverage = iff(isnotnull(Assocs) and Assocs > 0, 'Has DCR association', 'No DCR association')
| summarize count() by Coverage
content.title: DCR association coverage (no DCRA = no in-OS data)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend mid = tolower(id), name, rg = resourceGroup, os = tostring(properties.osType)
| project mid, name, rg, os
| join kind=leftouter (
    insightsresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.insights/datacollectionruleassociations'
    | extend mid = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/providers/microsoft.insights')[0]))
    | summarize DCRAs = count(), DCRs = make_set(tostring(properties.dataCollectionRuleId)) by mid
) on mid
| extend DCRAs = iff(isnull(DCRAs), 0, DCRAs)
| where DCRAs == 0
| project name, rg, os, DCRAs
| order by name asc
content.title: Machines with no DCR association (drill-down)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend osName = tostring(properties.osName), osVersion = tostring(properties.osVersion), agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion), status = tostring(properties.status), lastSeen = todatetime(properties.lastStatusChange)
| project name, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location, osName, osVersion, agentVersion, status, lastSeen, tags
| order by status asc, lastSeen asc
content.title: Inventory

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) startswith 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend state = tostring(properties.complianceState)
| where state in ('Compliant', 'NonCompliant')
| summarize count() by state
content.title: Policy compliance — Arc machines

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) startswith 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend def = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionName)
| summarize count() by def
| top 8 by count_
content.title: Top failing policy definitions

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) startswith 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| summarize Compliant = countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant'),
            NonCompliant = countif(properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant')
content.title: Policy state — Arc machines

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) startswith 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend machine = tostring(properties.resourceId), policyDef = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionName), assignment = tostring(properties.policyAssignmentName), timestamp = todatetime(properties.timestamp)
| summarize lastSeen = max(timestamp), violations = count() by machine, policyDef, assignment
| order by violations desc, lastSeen desc
content.title: Non-compliant Arc machines

content.query:
guestconfigurationresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.guestconfiguration/guestconfigurationassignments'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(tolower(id), '/providers/microsoft.guestconfiguration')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend status = tostring(properties.complianceStatus)
| where status in ('Compliant','NonCompliant')
| summarize count() by status
content.title: Assignment compliance

content.query:
guestconfigurationresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.guestconfiguration/guestconfigurationassignments'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(tolower(id), '/providers/microsoft.guestconfiguration')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| where tostring(properties.complianceStatus) == 'NonCompliant'
| extend configurationName = tostring(properties.guestConfiguration.name)
| where isnotempty(configurationName)
| summarize count() by configurationName
| top 10 by count_
content.title: Top non-compliant baselines

content.query:
guestconfigurationresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.guestconfiguration/guestconfigurationassignments'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(tolower(id), '/providers/microsoft.guestconfiguration')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend machineName = tostring(split(tolower(id), '/machines/')[1])
| extend machineName = tostring(split(machineName, '/')[0])
| extend status = tostring(properties.complianceStatus)
| where status == 'NonCompliant' and isnotempty(machineName)
| summarize count() by machineName
| top 10 by count_
content.title: Top non-compliant machines

content.query:
guestconfigurationresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.guestconfiguration/guestconfigurationassignments'
| extend machineId = tolower(tostring(split(tolower(id), '/providers/microsoft.guestconfiguration')[0])), assignment = name, compliance = tostring(properties.complianceStatus), lastCompliance = todatetime(properties.lastComplianceStatusChecked), configurationName = tostring(properties.guestConfiguration.name)
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project machineId = tolower(id), machineName = name, resourceGroup) on machineId
| project machineName, resourceGroup, configurationName, assignment, compliance, lastCompliance
| order by compliance asc, lastCompliance asc
content.title: Machine Configuration assignments — compliance

content.json: Edit the `requiredExtensions` and `requiredTags` arrays in the queries to match your baseline.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend state = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| extend state = iff(isempty(state), 'Unknown', state)
| summarize count() by state
content.title: Extension provisioning state

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend machineId = tolower(id), osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | extend machineId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | summarize installed = make_set(name) by machineId
) on machineId
| extend installed = iff(isnull(installed), dynamic([]), installed)
| extend
    AMA = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent') >= 0), 0, 1),
    ChangeTracking = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'ChangeTracking-Windows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'ChangeTracking-Linux') >= 0), 0, 1),
    Defender = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'MDE.Windows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'MDE.Linux') >= 0), 0, 1),
    AzurePolicy = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'AzurePolicyforWindows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'AzurePolicyforLinux') >= 0), 0, 1)
| summarize AMA = sum(AMA), ChangeTracking = sum(ChangeTracking), Defender = sum(Defender), AzurePolicy = sum(AzurePolicy)
| project Extension = pack_array('AMA','ChangeTracking','Defender','AzurePolicy'), MissingFrom = pack_array(AMA, ChangeTracking, Defender, AzurePolicy)
| mv-expand Extension to typeof(string), MissingFrom to typeof(int)
| where MissingFrom > 0
content.title: Most-missing required extensions (machines lacking each)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend machineId = tolower(id), machineName = name, osType = tostring(properties.osType)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | extend machineId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0]))
    | summarize installed = make_set(name) by machineId
) on machineId
| extend installed = iff(isnull(installed), dynamic([]), installed)
| extend
    AMA = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent') >= 0), 1, 0),
    ChangeTracking = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'ChangeTracking-Windows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'ChangeTracking-Linux') >= 0), 1, 0),
    Defender = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'MDE.Windows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'MDE.Linux') >= 0), 1, 0),
    AzurePolicy = iff((osType =~ 'windows' and array_index_of(installed,'AzurePolicyforWindows') >= 0) or (osType =~ 'linux' and array_index_of(installed,'AzurePolicyforLinux') >= 0), 1, 0)
| extend missingCount = (4 - AMA - ChangeTracking - Defender - AzurePolicy)
| project machineName, resourceGroup, osType, AMA, ChangeTracking, Defender, AzurePolicy, missingCount
| order by missingCount desc, machineName asc
content.title: Extension drift heatmap — required extensions per machine (1 = installed, 0 = missing)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend tagKeys = bag_keys(tags)
| extend hasEnvironment        = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'environment')        >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'Environment')        >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'ENVIRONMENT')        >= 0,
         hasOwner              = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'owner')              >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'Owner')              >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'OWNER')              >= 0,
         hasCostCenter         = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'costCenter')         >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'CostCenter')         >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'costcenter')         >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'cost-center')        >= 0,
         hasDataClassification = array_index_of(tagKeys, 'dataClassification') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'DataClassification') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'dataclassification') >= 0 or array_index_of(tagKeys, 'data-classification') >= 0
| extend missingCount = toint(not(hasEnvironment)) + toint(not(hasOwner)) + toint(not(hasCostCenter)) + toint(not(hasDataClassification))
| where missingCount > 0
| project name, resourceGroup, location, hasEnvironment, hasOwner, hasCostCenter, hasDataClassification, missingCount, tags
| order by missingCount desc
content.title: Tag drift

content.query:
patchassessmentresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/patchassessmentresults/softwarepatches'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/patchAssessmentResults/')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend classification = tostring(properties.classifications)
| extend classification = replace_regex(classification, @'[\[\]"]', '')
| extend classification = iff(isempty(classification), 'Other', classification)
| summarize count() by classification
content.title: Pending patches by classification

content.query:
patchassessmentresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/patchassessmentresults/softwarepatches'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/patchAssessmentResults/')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend severity = tostring(properties.msrcSeverity)
| extend severity = iff(isempty(severity), 'Unrated', severity)
| summarize count() by severity
content.title: Pending patches by MSRC severity

content.query:
patchassessmentresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/patchassessmentresults/softwarepatches'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/patchAssessmentResults/')[0]))
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend machineId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/providers/microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/')[1]))
| extend machineName = tostring(split(machineId, '/')[0])
| extend classification = tostring(properties.classifications), severity = tostring(properties.msrcSeverity), publishedDate = todatetime(properties.publishedDate)
| summarize pending = count(), critical = countif(severity =~ 'Critical'), security = countif(classification has 'Security'), oldest = min(publishedDate) by machineName
| order by critical desc, pending desc
content.title: Pending updates per machine

content.query:
securityresources
| where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status.code), severity = tostring(properties.metadata.severity), resourceId = tostring(properties.resourceDetails.Id)
| where status == 'Unhealthy'
| where tolower(resourceId) contains '/microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(resourceId)
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend severity = iff(isempty(severity), 'Unknown', severity)
| summarize count() by severity
content.title: Open recommendations by severity

content.query:
securityresources
| where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status.code), displayName = tostring(properties.displayName), resourceId = tostring(properties.resourceDetails.Id)
| where status == 'Unhealthy'
| where tolower(resourceId) contains '/microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(resourceId)
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| summarize count() by displayName
| top 8 by count_
content.title: Top open recommendation categories

content.query:
securityresources
| where type == 'microsoft.security/assessments'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status.code), severity = tostring(properties.metadata.severity), displayName = tostring(properties.displayName), resourceId = tostring(properties.resourceDetails.Id)
| where status == 'Unhealthy'
| where tolower(resourceId) contains '/microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/'
| extend _mIdJoin = tolower(resourceId)
| join kind=inner (resources | where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or tostring(properties.osType) =~ '{OSFilter}' | project _mId = tolower(id)) on $left._mIdJoin == $right._mId
| extend machineName = tostring(split(resourceId, '/machines/')[1])
| project machineName, displayName, severity, recommendation = name, resourceId
| order by severity asc, machineName asc
content.title: Open Defender for Cloud recommendations (Arc machines)

links.linkLabel: ↗ Open current view in Logs blade

bladeParameters.name: query
bladeParameters.value:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where _OSType =~ 'Windows'
| summarize count() by ConfigChangeType
content.title: Windows changes by type (services / registry / files / software)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where _OSType =~ 'Linux'
| summarize count() by ConfigChangeType
content.title: Linux changes by type (daemons / files / software)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| summarize count() by Computer
| top 8 by count_
content.title: Top noisy machines (by change count)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| summarize fileChanges=countif(ConfigChangeType=='Files'), registryChanges=countif(ConfigChangeType=='Registry'), serviceChanges=countif(ConfigChangeType=='WindowsServices'), softwareChanges=countif(ConfigChangeType=='Software'), daemonChanges=countif(ConfigChangeType=='Daemons'), total=count() by Computer
| order by total desc
content.title: Change Tracking — change counts by computer (click a row to drill in)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ConfigChangeType
| render timechart
content.title: Change rate over time (filtered)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| extend hour = datetime_part('hour', TimeGenerated), dow = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| where hour < 8 or hour >= 18 or dow == 0d or dow == 6d
| summarize AfterHoursChanges = count(), Last = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, ConfigChangeType
| order by AfterHoursChanges desc
content.title: After-hours changes (outside 08:00–18:00 local-to-agent, or weekends)

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| extend
    SensitiveFile = ConfigChangeType == 'Files' and ((FileSystemPath contains '/etc/passwd' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/shadow' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/sudoers' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/ssh/sshd_config' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/pam' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/cron' or FileSystemPath contains '/etc/hosts' or FileSystemPath contains 'drivers\\etc\\hosts' or FileSystemPath contains 'applicationHost.config' or FileSystemPath contains '\\System32\\Tasks\\')),
    SensitiveReg = ConfigChangeType == 'Registry' and ((RegistryKey contains 'Lsa' or RegistryKey contains 'Winlogon' or RegistryKey contains 'LanmanServer' or RegistryKey contains 'Defender' or RegistryKey contains 'CurrentVersion\\Run' or RegistryKey contains 'RunOnce' or RegistryKey contains 'Policies\\System')),
    SensitiveSvc = ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices' and (SvcName contains 'WinDefend' or SvcName contains 'MpsSvc' or SvcName contains 'Sense' or SvcName contains 'EventLog' or SvcName contains 'AzureMonitorAgent' or SvcName contains 'himds' or SvcName contains 'wuauserv'),
    SensitiveDaemon = ConfigChangeType == 'Daemons' and (SvcName contains 'sshd' or SvcName contains 'auditd' or SvcName contains 'firewalld' or SvcName contains 'ufw' or SvcName contains 'mdatp' or SvcName contains 'azuremonitoragent' or SvcName contains 'cron')
| where SensitiveFile or SensitiveReg or SensitiveSvc or SensitiveDaemon
| extend SensitiveCategory = case(SensitiveFile, 'File', SensitiveReg, 'Registry', SensitiveSvc, 'Service', SensitiveDaemon, 'Daemon', 'Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SensitiveCategory, ConfigChangeType, FileSystemPath, RegistryKey, ValueName, SvcName, SvcState, SvcPreviousState, _ResourceId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Sensitive changes — privileged paths, security registry, security services/daemons

bladeParameters.name: query
bladeParameters.value:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated == datetime('${TimeGenerated}')
| where Computer == '${Computer}'

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where '{selectedComputer}' == '' or Computer == '{selectedComputer}'
| where '{selectedChangeType}' == '' or ConfigChangeType == '{selectedChangeType}'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ConfigChangeType, ChangeCategory, FieldsChanged, SvcName, SvcDisplayName, SvcState, SvcPreviousState, FileSystemPath, Size, FileContentChecksum, SoftwareName, Publisher, Previous, Current, RegistryKey, ValueName, ValueData, _ResourceId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Change Tracking — detail (click a row to open the raw event in Logs)

bladeParameters.name: query
bladeParameters.value:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated == datetime('${TimeGenerated}')
| where Computer == '${Computer}'

content.json:
## Application configuration drift (in-OS)

This tab classifies in-OS Change Tracking signals (file edits, registry edits, service/daemon definition changes) into **application categories** so you can spot drift in things like web-server configs, database configs, container runtimes, SSH/auth, scheduled jobs, and app settings files.

> **Coverage note.** Only paths/keys included in your **Change Tracking DCR** are recorded. If a category looks empty, your DCR likely doesn't include those paths. Add them to the DCR's `dataSources.extensions` block (Linux: `fileSettings.fileSpecifications`, Windows: `fileSettings` and `registrySettings`).

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend pathLower = tolower(coalesce(FileSystemPath, RegistryKey, SvcName, ''))
| extend AppCategory = case(
    (pathLower contains 'nginx' or pathLower contains 'apache2' or pathLower contains '/httpd' or pathLower contains 'httpd.conf' or pathLower contains 'applicationhost.config' or pathLower contains 'web.config' or pathLower contains 'tomcat' or pathLower contains 'jboss' or pathLower contains 'wildfly'), 'Web server',
    (pathLower contains 'postgresql.conf' or pathLower contains 'pg_hba' or pathLower contains '/etc/mysql' or pathLower contains 'my.cnf' or pathLower contains 'mongod' or pathLower contains 'redis.conf' or pathLower contains 'mssql' or pathLower contains 'mariadb' or pathLower contains 'elasticsearch.yml'), 'Database',
    (pathLower contains 'php.ini' or pathLower contains 'machine.config' or pathLower contains '/etc/java' or pathLower contains 'jvm.options' or pathLower contains 'python' or pathLower contains '/etc/node' or pathLower contains 'npmrc'), 'Runtime',
    (pathLower contains 'docker' or pathLower contains '/etc/kubernetes' or pathLower contains 'kubelet' or pathLower contains 'containerd' or pathLower contains 'crio' or pathLower contains 'podman'), 'Container / orchestration',
    (pathLower contains 'sshd_config' or pathLower contains '/etc/sssd' or pathLower contains '/etc/pam' or pathLower contains 'krb5.conf' or pathLower contains '/etc/samba' or pathLower contains '/etc/security'), 'Auth / identity',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/systemd' or pathLower contains '\\system32\\tasks\\' or pathLower contains '/etc/init' or pathLower contains '/etc/rc' or pathLower contains 'svchost'), 'Init / scheduled tasks',
    (pathLower contains 'appsettings.json' or pathLower contains 'application.properties' or pathLower contains 'application.yml' or pathLower contains 'application.yaml' or pathLower contains '.env'), 'App settings',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/cron' or pathLower contains '/var/spool/cron' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.allow' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.deny'), 'Scheduling (cron / at)',
    (pathLower contains 'rsyslog' or pathLower contains 'syslog-ng' or pathLower contains '/etc/logrotate' or pathLower contains '/etc/audit' or pathLower contains 'eventlog'), 'Logging / audit',
    (pathLower contains 'iptables' or pathLower contains '/etc/ufw' or pathLower contains 'nftables' or pathLower contains 'firewalld' or pathLower contains 'firewallpolicy'), 'Firewall / network',
    'Other')
| where AppCategory != 'Other'
| summarize count() by AppCategory
content.title: App config changes by category

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend target = coalesce(FileSystemPath, RegistryKey, SvcName, '')
| where isnotempty(target)
| extend pathLower = tolower(target)
| where (pathLower contains 'nginx' or pathLower contains 'apache' or pathLower contains 'httpd' or pathLower contains 'applicationhost.config' or pathLower contains 'web.config' or pathLower contains 'postgresql.conf' or pathLower contains 'my.cnf' or pathLower contains 'mongod' or pathLower contains 'redis.conf' or pathLower contains 'mssql' or pathLower contains 'sshd_config' or pathLower contains '/etc/sssd' or pathLower contains '/etc/pam' or pathLower contains 'docker' or pathLower contains 'kubernetes' or pathLower contains 'containerd' or pathLower contains '/etc/systemd' or pathLower contains '/etc/cron' or pathLower contains 'rsyslog' or pathLower contains 'syslog-ng' or pathLower contains '/etc/logrotate' or pathLower contains 'iptables' or pathLower contains 'firewalld' or pathLower contains 'appsettings.json' or pathLower contains 'application.properties' or pathLower contains 'php.ini' or pathLower contains 'machine.config')
| summarize count() by target
| top 10 by count_
content.title: Top noisy app config targets

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationData
| where ConfigDataType == 'Files'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend pathLower = tolower(FileSystemPath)
| where (pathLower contains 'nginx' or pathLower contains 'apache' or pathLower contains 'httpd' or pathLower contains 'applicationhost.config' or pathLower contains 'web.config' or pathLower contains 'postgresql.conf' or pathLower contains 'my.cnf' or pathLower contains 'mongod' or pathLower contains 'redis.conf' or pathLower contains 'sshd_config' or pathLower contains '/etc/sssd' or pathLower contains '/etc/pam' or pathLower contains 'docker' or pathLower contains 'kubernetes' or pathLower contains 'containerd' or pathLower contains '/etc/systemd' or pathLower contains '/etc/cron' or pathLower contains 'rsyslog' or pathLower contains 'syslog-ng' or pathLower contains 'iptables' or pathLower contains 'firewalld' or pathLower contains 'appsettings.json' or pathLower contains 'application.properties' or pathLower contains 'php.ini' or pathLower contains 'machine.config')
// fleet-drift-latest: collapse to latest hash per (Computer, FileSystemPath) before comparing
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, FileContentChecksum) by Computer, FileSystemPath
| where isnotempty(FileContentChecksum)
| summarize machineCount = dcount(Computer), uniqueHashes = dcount(FileContentChecksum), hashes = make_set(FileContentChecksum, 10), machines = make_set(Computer, 10) by FileSystemPath
| where machineCount > 1 and uniqueHashes > 1
| extend driftScore = uniqueHashes
| order by driftScore desc, machineCount desc
content.title: Fleet drift — same config file, different SHA256 across machines

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend target = coalesce(FileSystemPath, RegistryKey, SvcName, '')
| where isnotempty(target)
| extend pathLower = tolower(target)
| extend AppCategory = case(
    (pathLower contains 'nginx' or pathLower contains 'apache2' or pathLower contains '/httpd' or pathLower contains 'httpd.conf' or pathLower contains 'applicationhost.config' or pathLower contains 'web.config' or pathLower contains 'tomcat' or pathLower contains 'jboss' or pathLower contains 'wildfly'), 'Web server',
    (pathLower contains 'postgresql.conf' or pathLower contains 'pg_hba' or pathLower contains '/etc/mysql' or pathLower contains 'my.cnf' or pathLower contains 'mongod' or pathLower contains 'redis.conf' or pathLower contains 'mssql' or pathLower contains 'mariadb' or pathLower contains 'elasticsearch.yml'), 'Database',
    (pathLower contains 'php.ini' or pathLower contains 'machine.config' or pathLower contains '/etc/java' or pathLower contains 'jvm.options' or pathLower contains 'python' or pathLower contains '/etc/node' or pathLower contains 'npmrc'), 'Runtime',
    (pathLower contains 'docker' or pathLower contains '/etc/kubernetes' or pathLower contains 'kubelet' or pathLower contains 'containerd' or pathLower contains 'crio' or pathLower contains 'podman'), 'Container / orchestration',
    (pathLower contains 'sshd_config' or pathLower contains '/etc/sssd' or pathLower contains '/etc/pam' or pathLower contains 'krb5.conf' or pathLower contains '/etc/samba' or pathLower contains '/etc/security'), 'Auth / identity',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/systemd' or pathLower contains '\\system32\\tasks\\' or pathLower contains '/etc/init' or pathLower contains '/etc/rc' or pathLower contains 'svchost'), 'Init / scheduled tasks',
    (pathLower contains 'appsettings.json' or pathLower contains 'application.properties' or pathLower contains 'application.yml' or pathLower contains 'application.yaml' or pathLower contains '.env'), 'App settings',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/cron' or pathLower contains '/var/spool/cron' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.allow' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.deny'), 'Scheduling (cron / at)',
    (pathLower contains 'rsyslog' or pathLower contains 'syslog-ng' or pathLower contains '/etc/logrotate' or pathLower contains '/etc/audit' or pathLower contains 'eventlog'), 'Logging / audit',
    (pathLower contains 'iptables' or pathLower contains '/etc/ufw' or pathLower contains 'nftables' or pathLower contains 'firewalld' or pathLower contains 'firewallpolicy'), 'Firewall / network',
    'Other')
| where AppCategory != 'Other'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, AppCategory, ConfigChangeType, target, ChangeCategory, FieldsChanged, Previous, Current, ValueData, SvcState, SvcPreviousState, FileContentChecksum, _ResourceId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent application config changes (file / registry / service)

bladeParameters.name: query
bladeParameters.value:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated == datetime('${TimeGenerated}')
| where Computer == '${Computer}'

content.query:
let _osMap = Heartbeat | where isnotempty(_ResourceId) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType) by _ResourceId | project _ResourceId, _OSType = OSType;
ConfigurationData
| where ConfigDataType == 'Files'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| lookup kind=leftouter _osMap on _ResourceId
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or _OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| extend pathLower = tolower(FileSystemPath)
| extend AppCategory = case(
    (pathLower contains 'nginx' or pathLower contains 'apache2' or pathLower contains '/httpd' or pathLower contains 'httpd.conf' or pathLower contains 'applicationhost.config' or pathLower contains 'web.config' or pathLower contains 'tomcat' or pathLower contains 'jboss' or pathLower contains 'wildfly'), 'Web server',
    (pathLower contains 'postgresql.conf' or pathLower contains 'pg_hba' or pathLower contains '/etc/mysql' or pathLower contains 'my.cnf' or pathLower contains 'mongod' or pathLower contains 'redis.conf' or pathLower contains 'mssql' or pathLower contains 'mariadb' or pathLower contains 'elasticsearch.yml'), 'Database',
    (pathLower contains 'php.ini' or pathLower contains 'machine.config' or pathLower contains '/etc/java' or pathLower contains 'jvm.options' or pathLower contains 'python' or pathLower contains '/etc/node' or pathLower contains 'npmrc'), 'Runtime',
    (pathLower contains 'docker' or pathLower contains '/etc/kubernetes' or pathLower contains 'kubelet' or pathLower contains 'containerd' or pathLower contains 'crio' or pathLower contains 'podman'), 'Container / orchestration',
    (pathLower contains 'sshd_config' or pathLower contains '/etc/sssd' or pathLower contains '/etc/pam' or pathLower contains 'krb5.conf' or pathLower contains '/etc/samba' or pathLower contains '/etc/security'), 'Auth / identity',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/systemd' or pathLower contains '\\system32\\tasks\\' or pathLower contains '/etc/init' or pathLower contains '/etc/rc' or pathLower contains 'svchost'), 'Init / scheduled tasks',
    (pathLower contains 'appsettings.json' or pathLower contains 'application.properties' or pathLower contains 'application.yml' or pathLower contains 'application.yaml' or pathLower contains '.env'), 'App settings',
    (pathLower contains '/etc/cron' or pathLower contains '/var/spool/cron' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.allow' or pathLower contains '/etc/at.deny'), 'Scheduling (cron / at)',
    (pathLower contains 'rsyslog' or pathLower contains 'syslog-ng' or pathLower contains '/etc/logrotate' or pathLower contains '/etc/audit' or pathLower contains 'eventlog'), 'Logging / audit',
    (pathLower contains 'iptables' or pathLower contains '/etc/ufw' or pathLower contains 'nftables' or pathLower contains 'firewalld' or pathLower contains 'firewallpolicy'), 'Firewall / network',
    'Other')
| where AppCategory != 'Other'
| summarize tracked = dcount(FileSystemPath), files = dcount(strcat(Computer,'|',FileSystemPath)) by AppCategory
| order by files desc
content.title: Coverage — distinct app config paths/files currently being inventoried by Change Tracking

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where ConfigDataType == 'Software'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| extend Publisher = iff(isempty(Publisher), 'Unknown', Publisher)
| summarize count() by Publisher
| top 10 by count_
content.title: Software inventory by publisher (top 10)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where Category == 'Direct Agent' or Category == 'Azure Monitor Agent'
| summarize lastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Status = case(
    datetime_diff('minute', now(), lastHeartbeat) > 60, 'Stale (>60 min)',
    datetime_diff('minute', now(), lastHeartbeat) > 15, 'Lagging (15-60 min)',
    'Healthy (<15 min)')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Heartbeat freshness

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where Category == 'Direct Agent'
| summarize lastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, OSName, ComputerEnvironment
| where ComputerEnvironment == 'Non-Azure'
| extend minutesSinceHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), lastHeartbeat)
| where minutesSinceHeartbeat > 60
| order by minutesSinceHeartbeat desc
content.title: Stale Arc machines (no heartbeat > 60 minutes)

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or OSType =~ '{OSFilter}'
| where ConfigDataType == 'Software'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize machines = make_set(Computer), machineCount = dcount(Computer) by SoftwareName, Publisher, CurrentVersion
| extend totalMachines = toscalar(ConfigurationData | where '{OSFilter}' == 'All' or OSType =~ '{OSFilter}' | where ConfigDataType == 'Software' and TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize dcount(Computer))
| extend coverage = round(100.0 * machineCount / totalMachines, 1)
| where coverage < 100 and coverage > 0
| project SoftwareName, Publisher, CurrentVersion, machineCount, totalMachines, coverage, machines
| order by coverage asc, SoftwareName asc
content.title: Software inventory — partial-coverage entries (potential drift)
